text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Fan Fest is here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The academy is bustling with countless
Umamusume devotees. But I sense more and more
people will be coming...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So of course, there's no way a particular
Umamusume is going to stay put.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, everyone! It is I, model student and
class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sakura Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Since there are a lot of you here today, make sure
to watch your step!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Good to see you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
An event like this needs a reliable class
representative to keep an eye out.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And today I plan to shine even more than usual!
choice_data_list: And how do you plan to do that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I signed up for a bunch of races! About thirty of
them!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I want to show off my speed to as many people as
possible!
choice_data_list: Just... don't push yourself too hard, okay?
Just... don't push yourself too hard, okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Roger!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Just watch, I'm scoring first place with my "Spin
Dash" the second I'm out of here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O is really determined to get
those wins...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hm?! I sense a rabble rouser is afoot!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now who would dare invoke the wrath of this
mean lean class representative machine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And after that...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Tachyon! Where are you?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You cannot make suspicious-looking medicine
without authorization! Go and get permission
first!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! She came through like a hurricane!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: Oh no, my ice cream! Darn...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Do I hear the sound of chatter from a
classroom that is strictly off-limits?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hey! Who's in there?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Oh no, the poster! The wind has torn it to bits..

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day continues like this, until finally...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Things have finally calmed down! Now is
about time to run in those races...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait, how come it's evening already?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: All the races are over for today? That can't be!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
So you were here, Bakushin O. I was looking for
you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The awards ceremony is about to begin. Come
with me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The awards ceremony?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But I didn't compete in a single race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, did I get first for best model student?! That
would make perfect sense!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I would gladly receive that reward every day!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So impertinent. Just follow me!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
And so, today's "Most Excellent Sprinter" is
Sakura Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! "Most Excellent Sprinter"?!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
You made the selection for the following reason:
"You were faster than anyone else today."
Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: N-no way! Though I am faster than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The award is for being a fast sprinter then? Not
for being a model student?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Aw shucks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O is a little dejected, but all in
all, the Fan Fest ends in a success.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
It has been decided that Sakura Bakushin O will
receive a special reward from the student
council—the Hardest Worker Award!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The Hardest Worker Award?!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
The sight of you sprinting wildly around the
academy was exemplary! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ohh! Whoaa!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Exemplary! That's what the student council thinks
of me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I guess this makes me the best model student
ever! I could even be a college class
representative at my level!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It comes with a reward. Consider it a gift from the
student council.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yay! It must be a plate or a trophy!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Not quite.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your running around left a mess in its wake,
you're on clean-up duty for every location you
trashed up!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The hallway, school gates, classrooms, and the
tracks! I want to see them all spick and span!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Waah?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But I'll accept! They do say to clean up your own
messes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I am Sakura Bakushin O, winner of the Hardest
Worker Award! I will clean with beauty and grace!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushiiin! Bang, craaash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, kaboom!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You say that, but you're just making more of a
mess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, some matters aside, the Fan Fest is a big
success!
